parts.text: I’d like to know if any early termination or disconnection fees will apply to my account closure.
Can you explain how cancellation fees are calculated for my account?
Are there disconnection or cancellation charges if I terminate service
today
I want to check if there’s a fee associated with canceling my device plan.
Please provide information on any penalties for canceling service before the contract ends.
I’d like to verify whether any early termination fees apply to my account.
Can you tell me if I’ll be billed for a termination fee if I port out my numbers?
Are cancellation fees different if I close multiple services at the same time?
I need details on early termination fees for each of my phone lines.
Please explain any fees I might face if I end my mobile service prematurely.
I want to understand if there’s a disconnection charge for canceling my service.
Can you help me calculate the total termination fees for my account?
Are there any fees applied if I remove
one
line from my account?
I’d like to know the cost of terminating my services early.
Can you clarify whether my account will incur a cancellation fee if I close it now?
I want to know if there is a penalty for disconnecting my service before the contract ends.
Please provide details on any fees for canceling my subscription.
I’d like to understand the charges associated with early account termination.
Can you confirm if I have to pay a termination fee for all
three
of my lines?
Are there cancellation fees if I port my number to another carrier? -- Port-out (Intent)
I need to know if canceling my phone line will result in any charges.
Please explain any disconnection fees I might incur if I cancel my service.
Are there any early termination fees if I end my contract before the term is up?
I want to know if I will be charged a cancellation fee for closing my account.
Can you tell me if there are any fees for canceling my service early?
